---
title: "Abundance Analysis"
author: "Monica Kim"
date: "2026-03-31"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
# receptors
receptors <- c("IGK", "IGL", "IGH", "TRA", "TRB", "TRD", "TRG")

# read and combine
data_list <- lapply(receptors, function(r) {
  df <- read.csv(paste0(r, "_PerPatientCountStats_2026-03-22.csv"))
  df$receptor <- r
  return(df)
})

combined_df <- bind_rows(data_list)
```

```{r}
combined_df <- combined_df %>%
  mutate(patient = gsub("\\.Aligned\\.sortedByCoord\\.out\\.bam", "", patient))

combined_df <- combined_df %>%
  mutate(clonality = max_count / total_count)

receptor_summary <- combined_df %>%
  group_by(receptor) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_total = mean(total_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_total = median(total_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_richness = mean(num_unique_CDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_clonality = mean(clonality, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_patients = n()
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_total))

print(receptor_summary)
```

```{r}
ggplot(combined_df, aes(x = receptor, y = total_count)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Receptor Abundance (Total Counts)", y = "Total Counts (log scale)")
```

```{r}
combined_df <- combined_df %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(grepl("^IG", receptor), "B_cell", "T_cell"))

group_summary <- combined_df %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_total = mean(total_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_richness = mean(num_unique_CDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_clonality = mean(clonality, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

group_summary
```

```{r}
# immune reads per patient
patient_totals <- combined_df %>%
  group_by(patient) %>%
  summarise(total_immune = sum(total_count, na.rm = TRUE))

# proportions
combined_df <- combined_df %>%
  left_join(patient_totals, by = "patient") %>%
  mutate(proportion = total_count / total_immune)
```

```{r}
ggplot(combined_df, aes(x = receptor, y = proportion)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Receptor Proportion per Patient", y = "Proportion of Total Immune Reads")
```
